allow: Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''@tabler/icons-react''\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(''digital''\)\); console.log\(names\);")

Bash(node -e "const icons = require\(''@tabler/icons-react''\); console.log\(''aws:'', !!icons.IconBrandAws\); console.log\(''gcp:'', !!icons.IconBrandGoogleCloud\); console.log\(''azure:'', !!icons.IconBrandAzure\); console.log\(''cloud:'', !!icons.IconCloud\); console.log\(''droplet:'', !!icons.IconDroplet\); console.log\(''search:'', !!icons.IconSearch\); console.log\(''bolt:'', !!icons.IconBolt\); console.log\(''brandOpenSource:'', !!icons.IconBrandOpenSource\);")

Bash(node -e 'const icons = require\(""@tabler/icons-react""\); console.log\(""aws:"", ""IconBrandAws"" in icons\); console.log\(""gcp:"", ""IconBrandGoogleCloud"" in icons\); console.log\(""azure:"", ""IconBrandAzure"" in icons\); console.log\(""cloud:"", ""IconCloud"" in icons\); console.log\(""droplet:"", ""IconDroplet"" in icons\); console.log\(""search:"", ""IconSearch"" in icons\); console.log\(""bolt:"", ""IconBolt"" in icons\); console.log\(""brandOpenSource:"", ""IconBrandOpenSource"" in icons\);')
Bash(node -e 'const icons = require\(""@tabler/icons-react""\); const names = Object.keys\(icons\).filter\(k => k.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(""google""\)\); console.log\(names\);')
